text: - [ ]  At remote locations, such as rural farms, lots, or undeveloped areas, the supervisor will designate an Page 10 of 12 HIPP/Sample Procedures Rev. 05.2019 employee or employees to physically go to the nearest road or highway where emergency responders can see them. If daylight is diminished, the designated employee(s) shall be given reflective vests or flashlights to direct emergency personnel to the sick employee's location, which may not be visible from the road or highway.
